MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ruth Downes, Esq., 530.758.8029, for plaintiff Unifund CCR Partners; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR PARTNERS, A NEW YORK PARTNERSHIP's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-08-2014 Continued To Jun-09-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

No appearance. The Court adopted the tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR PARTNERS, A NEW YORK PARTNERSHIP's MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is continued to June 9, 2014, to give the moving party a chance to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The moving party shall immediately provide a courtesy copy of its moving papers with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.
